records.display_name: Port Jefferson Branch bus replacement

payload.claim_text: With both main tracks out of service between Hicksville and Port Jefferson, bus service will replace train service for approximately 48-hours.
payload.subject: Port Jefferson Branch

records.display_name: Main Line cross-honoring with NYCTA Bus

payload.claim_text: With the local westbound track out of service between Queens Village and Jamaica, NYCTA Bus will cross-honor customers at Queens Village and Hollis Stations. There will be no westbound service from Elmont-UBS Arena during these timeframes. Customers are encouraged to utilize Bellerose Station for westbound train service to Jamaica.
payload.subject: Main Line

records.display_name: Laurelton/Atlantic Branch bus replacement

payload.claim_text: With both main tracks out of service on the Atlantic Branch between Jamaica and Valley Stream, bus service will replace train service to/from Locust Manor, Laurelton, and Rosedale for a period of 48-hours.
payload.subject: Atlantic Branch ADA Station Rehabilitation at Laurelton

records.display_name: Main Line Track Maintenance - Queens Village to Jamaica

payload.description: Track maintenance on the local westbound track between Queens Village and Jamaica, affecting service to Elmont-UBS Arena, Queens Village, and Hollis stations

records.raw_text: Main Line – Maintenance – The local westbound track that services Elmont-UBS Arena, Queens Village, and Hollis will be taken out of service Monday through Thursday between July 8th and July 25th during the midday period, as track maintenance is performed.

records.display_name: Port Jefferson Branch Switch Installation and Track Maintenance

payload.description: Switch installations, rail replacement and bridge maintenance on the Port Jefferson Branch between Hicksville and Port Jefferson, with bus service replacing train service on weekends
payload.project_name: Port Jefferson Branch Switch Installation and Track Maintenance

records.raw_text: Port Jefferson Branch – Switch Installation and Track Maintenance – On the weekends of June 29-30, July 13-14, July 20-21, July 27-28, and August 3-4, both main tracks between Hicksville and Port Jefferson will be taken out of service for a period of approximately 48-hours to support a series of switch installations, as well as rail replacement and bridge maintenance at various locations on the Port Jefferson Branch.

records.display_name: Atlantic Branch ADA Station Rehabilitation - Laurelton

payload.description: ADA station rehabilitation at Laurelton on the Atlantic Branch, with bus service replacing train service to/from Locust Manor, Laurelton, and Rosedale on weekends

records.raw_text: Atlantic Branch – ADA Station Rehabilitation – Laurelton – On the weekends of June 29-30, July 13-14, July 20-21, July 27-28, and August 3-4, both main tracks on the Atlantic Branch between Jamaica and Valley Stream will be out of service to support the ADA Accessibility Project at Laurelton.
